EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISegmentZ2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that allow manipulations of segments with Zs.

[Guid("DF1F1E7D-6B8C-44C1-A005-92A8A56CB4CF")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISegmentZ2 : ISegmentZ

Methods

Densify3D(int, double, out int, out ILine)

Densify segment into the specified number of smaller segments. This method is intended for internal use only.

void Densify3D(int cMaxSegments, double maxDeviation, out int pcOutSegments, out ILine ppSegments)

Parameters

cMaxSegments int
maxDeviation double
pcOutSegments int
ppSegments ILine
